subject: Human Resources
title: The Employee Experience Era
description: A quick win: understand The Employee Experience Era.

hook.text: Companies design customer experiences obsessively. Airbnb asked: why not design the employee experience too?

buildup.text: Employee experience (EX) covers every touchpoint—hiring, onboarding, workspace, tools, culture, and exit.

discovery.text: Airbnb renamed their CHRO to 'Head of Employee Experience'—signaling a fundamental shift in HR's mission.

twist.text: EX isn't about perks like ping-pong tables. It's about removing friction and creating meaning in daily work.

climax.text: Companies with the best employee experiences outperform peers in revenue growth, profitability, and innovation.

punchline.text: Design work for humans. The results follow.

quiz.question: What is employee experience (EX)?
options: Every touchpoint of an employee's journey at a company
Just office perks and free food
